response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience, an entrepreneurial background, and a strong track record of community engagement through workshops and open-source projects. However, for a Director-level Principal Engineer role centered on AI Strategy, he lacks the deep, recognized expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning required. His AI exposure is very recent and primarily focused on tactical implementation rather than executive-level strategy, making him a better fit for a Senior or Staff full-stack role rather than an AI strategic leadership position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems.
Entrepreneurial drive demonstrated by founding GISCollective and maintaining multiple open-source projects.
Proven ability to inspire and educate the technical community through workshops, talks, and mentoring.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI and machine learning expertise expected for a Director-level AI strategy role.
AI experience is very recent and focused on tool implementation rather than high-level cloud and AI strategy.
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge AI adoption.
